title: Language Papers
subtitle: Qualifying compulsory papers (English and any selected Indian Language) that candidates must pass.

items.text: Essay writing on a given topic (100 marks)
Reading Comprehension and answering questions based on passage (75 marks)
Précis writing - summarizing a long passage into 1/3rd words (75 marks)
Usage and Vocabulary: Sentence correction, antonyms, synonyms, idioms (50 marks)

topics.name: Indian Language Skills (e.g., Hindi, Marathi, Tamil, etc.)

items.text: Essay writing in the chosen Indian language (100 marks)
Reading Comprehension in the chosen language (60 marks)
Précis writing in the chosen language (60 marks)
Translation from English to the chosen Indian language (20 marks)
Translation from the chosen Indian language to English (20 marks)
Grammar, usage, and idioms in the chosen Indian language (40 marks)
